name: Eton Pharmaceuticals, Inc.
summary: PART I About Eton Eton is an innovative pharmaceutical company focused on developing and commercializing treatments for rare diseases. We currently have eightcommercial rare disease products: INCRELEX, ALKINDI SPRINKLE, KHINDIVI TM ,GALZIN, PKU GOLIKE, Carglumic Acid, Betaine Anhydrous, and Nitisinone. Wehave five additional product candidates in late-stage development: ET-600, Amglidia, ET-700, ET-800 and ZENEO hydrocortisone autoinjector. INCRELEX This biologic product was approved by the FDA ...
